ddls:
CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was posted */,
  "hour" TEXT /* Time when the comment was posted */,
  "raw_text" TEXT /* Raw text of the comment */,
  "text_with_keywords" TEXT /* Text with specific keywords or phrases (e.g., games) */,
  "clean_text" TEXT /* Cleaned text of the comment after preprocessing */,
  "sentiment_label" TEXT /* Sentiment label of the comment (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who posted the comment */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment (if it's a reply) */,
  "comment_type" TEXT /* Type of comment (e.g., original, reply) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., Twitter, Reddit) */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., social media, forum) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data collected (e.g., JSON, CSV) */,
  "collection_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., moderator, analyst, admin) */,
  "joined_date" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the system */,
  "last_active_date" TEXT /* Date when the user was last active */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, inactive, banned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentiment_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentiment analysis result */,
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comment being analyzed */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Sentiment score of the comment (e.g., -1 to 1) */,
  "sentiment_label" TEXT /* Sentiment label of the comment (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the sentiment analysis was performed */,
  "model_used" TEXT /* Name of the sentiment analysis model used */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the sentiment analysis result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sentiment_analysis_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comment being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the access occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "access_result" TEXT /* Result of the access (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "moderation_actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each moderation action */,
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comment being moderated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of moderation action (e.g., approve, reject, flag) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date when the action was taken */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the moderation action */,
  "action_result" TEXT /* Result of the moderation action (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moderation_actions_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moderation_actions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the trend data */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., total_comments, average_sentiment) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the trend (e.g., politics, sports) */,
  "subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the trend (e.g., elections, football) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trends_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comment_entities" (
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entity */,
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comment from which the entity was extracted */,
  "entity_name" TEXT /* Name of the entity */,
  "entity_type" TEXT /* Type of entity (e.g., person, organization, location) */,
  "start_index" INTEGER /* Start index of the entity in the comment text */,
  "end_index" INTEGER /* End index of the entity in the comment text */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comment_entities_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "keywords" (
  "keyword_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each keyword */,
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comment from which the keyword was extracted */,
  "keyword" TEXT /* Keyword extracted from the comment */,
  "relevance_score" REAL /* Relevance score of the keyword */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("keyword_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_keywords_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id")
)
